papers.title: AICompanionBench: Benchmarking LLMs-as-Judges for AI Companion Safety

papers.title: Empathy on Demand: How Empathic AI Can Scale Emotional Support for Verbal Harassment

papers.title: Anatomy of Post-Training: Using Interpretability to Characterize Data and Shape the Learning Signal

papers.title: Context-Driven Incremental Compression for Multi-Turn Dialogue Generation

papers.title: Beyond Retrieval: Learning Compact User Representations for Scalable LLM Personalization

papers.title: Organize then Retrieve: Hierarchical Memory Navigation for Efficient Agents
papers.reason_cn: 论文直接命中5级核心方向“大模型记忆”：提出分层记忆组织与导航框架HORMA，解决长期任务中的上下文膨胀问题，涉及记忆构造、检索、更新等核心机制，并在LongMemEval等记忆基准上评测，属于记忆框架与记忆评测双重强相关。方法创新性强、实验扎实，token用量降低至22.17%且性能提升，工程启发明确。虽未明确关联情感陪伴或POI场景，但多轮交互优化可间接收益，符合level2入库标准。

papers.title: Selection Integrity for LLM Graph Memory: An Accumulability Criterion for Information-Flow-Blind Retrieval
